title: eriogonum nutans
intro: Eriogonum nutans, also known as the brittle buckwheat or squirrel tail, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Eriogonum nutans include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of Eriogonum nutans include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
